checklist.detail: Diff extends internal/language_tiers/ (per requeue) with 5-tier enum, String(), languageTiers map of 22 entries, TierForLanguage, and three named tests matching plan steps 2-7. Step 1 (KnownLanguages) not in diff but build passes so presumably pre-existing.
checklist.label: Implements the approved plan

checklist.detail: Only 2 files changed, both in internal/language_tiers/ — no unrelated churn. Plan's step 1 (discovery/generic.go) not in this diff but may be pre-existing.
checklist.label: Minimal and scoped

checklist.detail: s1 commit removes hardcoded-list test (TestLanguageTiersRegistry) and replaces with proper dynamic tests; TierForLanguage returns real fallback, Swift pinned to TierGeneric — no weakened or deleted assertions.
checklist.label: No test-gaming / faking

checklist.detail: Enum iota backward-compatible (TierGeneric stays at 1), TierForLanguage fail-safe returns TierGeneric for unknowns, no doc/code mismatches in visible comments.
checklist.label: Safe to advance

checklist.detail: at or above the confidence bar
checklist.label: Judge confidence
